Test Scenarios: US10. As a coach, I can book a session for a client in the Workspace via Book Session CTA
Open Book Session popup via CTA button with default prefills
Step:
1. Navigate to Calendar page on Booking feature
2. Click Book a session CTA button
3. Verify popup opens with title Book a session
4. Verify background calendar is dimmed and focus is trapped inside modal
5. Verify all fields are present: Trainer (disabled), Client, Start Date, Start Time, Type, Name, Duration, Location, Description, Add note to client
6. Verify CTA buttons Book Session and Cancel are displayed, plus Close icon
7. Verify default values: Start date = Today, Start time = 7:00 AM, Duration = 30 min, Location = In-person, Trainer = WS Owner (disabled)
Test Data:
Logged in as Owner/Admin.
Booking feature enabled for Workspace.
Expected:
- Book a session popup displays
- Background calendar is dimmed
- Focus trapped inside modal
- Trainer field disabled, default to WS Owner
- Start date = today's date
- Start time = 7:00 AM
- Duration = 30 min
- Location = In-person
- All required and optional fields visible
